items.title_en: Chip giant ASML raises 2026 guidance as AI semiconductor demand stays strong

items.title_en: European markets eye mixed open as traders assess Iran war latest

items.title_en: Samsung SDS shares jump 20% on KKR partnership and $820 million bond purchase

items.desc_en: KKR & Co has agreed to acquire $820 million of newly issued convertible bonds from Samsung SDS, in a deal that creates a new strategic partnership.

items.title_en: Trump’s Hormuz blockade puts China, India in crosshairs as U.S. pressure on Iran spills over

items.title_zh: 阿根廷传奇球星马拉多纳死亡重审开始

items.desc_zh: 第一次审判——马拉多纳的医疗队成员被指控护理不善——在法官让摄像机进入法庭后宣告失败。

items.title_en: What's changed since Harry and Meghan last visited Australia in 2018?
items.title_zh: 自哈利和梅根上次访问澳大利亚 2018 年以来发生了什么变化？

items.desc_zh: BBC 新闻记者西蒙·阿特金森 (Simon Atkinson) 解释了这对夫妇的这次旅行与上次访问相比有何不同。

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀
items.desc_en: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。
